text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'm itchin' to run, but these legs just won't move...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Ya think my power's skedaddled off
somewhere?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looks like the fatigue is catching up to her. This
might call for some changes to her race schedule.
